facts.label: Spouse's name
facts.probe: Ask warmly how their spouse is doing these days, in a way that invites them to mention the name.

facts.label: Daughter's name
facts.probe: Ask who usually calls or checks in on them, hoping they mention their daughter by name.

facts.label: Where they live
facts.probe: Ask what their neighbourhood is like or how long they have lived in their area.

facts.label: Grandson's Saturday visit
facts.probe: Ask if any family members are coming to visit soon.
facts.canonical: Grandson Budi is visiting on Saturday

facts.label: What they ate recently
facts.probe: Ask what they have been eating lately or what they last cooked.
